name: WLF_GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT b.GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID, b.OBJECT_CATEGORY OBJECT_CATEGORY, tl.NAME NAME, b.OBJECT_TYPE_LOOKUP OBJECT_TYPE_LOOKUP, b.OBJECT_SUB_TYPE_LOOKUP OBJECT_SUB_TYPE_LOOKUP, b.CONSUMER_IMPLEMENTATION_CLASS CONSUMER_IMPLEMENTATION_CLASS, tl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, tl.LANGUAGE LANGUAGE, tl.SOURCE_LANG SOURCE_LANG, b.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, b.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, b.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, b.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID FROM WLF_GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_B b, WLF_GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_TL tl WHERE b.GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID = tl.GRW_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID AND tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
